## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do and why? -->

## Related issue

<!-- e.g. "Closes #123". Open an issue first for substantial changes (see CONTRIBUTING.md). -->

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behavior)
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Refactor / chore (no functional change)

## Affected component

- [ ] API (`services/api`)
- [ ] Web (`apps/web`)
- [ ] Scheduling engine (`packages/core`)
- [ ] Android client (`apps/android`)
- [ ] iOS client (`apps/ios`)
- [ ] CI / tooling

## Testing

<!-- How did you verify this change? Commands run, scenarios covered. -->

- [ ] API: `make test && make build`
- [ ] Web: `npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build`
- [ ] Other (describe):

## Checklist

- [ ] My change follows the project's style and the [Contributing guide](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] I signed off my commits (DCO) with `git commit -s`
- [ ] Tests pass locally (the same checks CI runs)
- [ ] I added or updated tests where appropriate
- [ ] Docs updated (README / per-app docs) where relevant
- [ ] This PR is focused on a single concern
